name: Windows Defender Configuration
categoryDescription: Security policy configuration, local user accounts, audit settings, and authentication configuration.
description: Windows Defender AV configuration — DisableAntiSpyware, DisableRealtimeMonitoring, exclusion paths/processes.
forensic_value: Exclusion paths are primary attacker target. DisableAntiSpyware/DisableRealtimeMonitoring under Policies indicates GPO-enforced AV disabling. Cross-reference with Defender Operational log EIDs 5001/5007.
